default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss next steps for Breyta's pilot engagement with growthx.ai, addressing challenges and exploring alternative content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Breyta wants to extract value from their $40,500 investment, focusing on landing pages and interactive content](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [growthx.ai experienced unusual challenges during calibration, leading to subpar content quality](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [New approach: Create landing pages for influencers/conferences with AI-powered interactive knowledge bases](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [growthx.ai to attempt one more article on "future of user research" with updated workflow](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Issues

  - [Inaccuracies in articles were a major concern](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Tone of voice document not properly implemented in content](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Possible contributing factor: recent switch from u.com to perplexity.ai for research](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Chris demonstrated alternative AI tool producing better results](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

### New Content Strategy

  - [Shift focus from blog posts to landing pages for influencers, conferences, and podcasts](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Create AI-powered interactive knowledge bases using scraped content](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Template in Webflow for consistent page structure](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Aim: \~128 landing pages (based on pilot contract value)](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Technical Approach

  - [Use AI agent to scrape content from influencer blogs, conference sessions, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Create public workspaces in Breyta with uploaded content](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Implement templatized version in Webflow for each landing page](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Allow users to interact with knowledge base on each page](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)

### Next Steps for growthx.ai

  - [Attempt one more article on "future of user research" with updated workflow](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Jen and Dave (new director with programmatic experience) to be looped in](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Explore creating landing pages for various personas (influencers, conferences, podcasts)](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Focus on "good enough" quality standard, balancing scale and content value](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)

## Next Steps

  - [growthx.ai to create two versions of a new article on "future of user research"](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Kyle to brief Jen and Dave on new approach and requirements](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [growthx.ai to research potential personas for landing pages (influencers, conferences, podcasts)](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Explore technical feasibility of AI-powered interactive knowledge bases](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Kyle to keep Chris updated on progress and any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/EygsDJmUwKZ9tLbb81YSLzfwUa43zqHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)

action_items.description: Circle back w/ team re link building status, report to Chris
Discuss w/ team removing Breyta product info from content gen
Experiment w/ tone of voice doc implementation in content gen process
Brief Jen & Dave on new approach for landing pages (influencers/conferences)
Have team create 2 versions of "future of user research" article, DM to Chris on Slack
